details.publicNotes:
Conversion notes (this module)

Role (A72/A73): the Red Mantis guild-mistress from Mediogalti Island — Cinnabar's former commander — who took charge of the eight assassins who survived the Deathhead Vault rout. Ileosa gave them the fourth floor; Kayltanya has forbidden revenge on the PCs until the queen returns from her 'errand' and funds reinforcements — the PCs' arrival in the castle voids that order. She sleeps in the bar's hammock (A73) and joins the A72 hammock-ambush the moment it erupts. The Crown's last professional.

0.label: +30 to Long Jump and High Jump

description.value: Kayltanya senses if a creature she has slain within the last year has been restored to life, as long as they are both on the same plane.

items.name: +2 Greater Striking Returning Dagger (coated with purple worm venom)

description.value: This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.
The signature weapon of the Red Mantis assassins, this curved blade is serrated like a saw, hence the name.

A suit of chain mail consists of several pieces of armor composed of small metal rings linked together in a protective mesh. It typically includes a chain shirt, leggings, a pair of arms, and a coif, collectively protecting most of the body.

A mask of the mantis is the traditional headgear of a Red Mantis assassin. Designed to both conceal the wearer's identity and give the wearer a ferocious appearance. You gain a +2 item bonus to Perception checks.

Activate D envision, Interact

Frequency once per day; Duration 1 hour

Effect The masks wearer gains one of the following two effects; darkvision up to 60 feet or Deathwatch. This choice is made when the wearer Activates the mask.

Deathwatch You can determine the condition of creatures near death within 30 feet. You instantly know whether each creature within the area is dead, fragile (alive and wounded, with 3 or fewer hit points left), fighting off death (alive with 4 or more hit points), healthy, undead, or neither alive nor dead (such as a construct). Deathwatch sees through any spell or ability that allows creatures to feign death.

Kayltanya swathes herself in a veil of red mist for 1 minute. While the shroud is active, Kayltanya gains fast healing 4. Kayltanya can Interact with her shroud, swirling it around herself, to gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the beginning of her next turn. Finally, if Kayltanya dies while the shroud is active, she can choose to have her body vanish into red mist, leaving behind only her gear; she makes this choice when she activates Crimson Shroud.
Kayltanya is immune to visual effects of illusion spells cast by other red mantis assassins or their allies.

Trigger Kayltanya is targeted with a Strike by while Crimson Shroud is active.

Frequency Once per Crimson Shroud.

Effect The attacker must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:11]; on a failure, the attack passes harmlessly through the image of Kayltanya that remains behind. An instant later Kayltanya returns to reality, and her Crimson Shroud ends.

The target can soar through the air, gaining a fly Speed equal to its Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

Heightened (7th) The duration increases to 1 hour.

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

You create a pattern of shifting colors that hovers in the air in a geometric cloud. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while inside the pattern. In addition, a creature must attempt a Will saving throw if it is inside the pattern when you cast it, when it enters the pattern, when it ends its turn within the pattern, or if it uses a Seek or Interact action on the pattern. A creature currently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the pattern doesn't attempt new saves.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern.

Critical Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern. While it remains Fascinated, it can't use reactions.

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

You gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{Spell Effect: Fleet Step}

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

You belch forth a swarm of magical vermin. You evoke and shape the creatures from your own imagination, allowing you to change the appearance of the creatures (typically a mix of centipedes, roaches, wasps, and worms), but this doesn't change the effect of the spell. The vermin swarm over anyone in the area, their bites and stings dealing [[/r {2d8}[piercing]]]{2d8 piercing damage} (basic Reflex save). A creature that fails its saving throw also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. Once the spell ends, the swarm disappears.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by [[/r {1d8}[piercing]]]{1d8 piercing}.
You become a mantis. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.XI6Lzd2B5pernkPd]{Insect Form}, heightened to mantis form's level, and you can only transform into a mantis.
Kayltanya can cast vomit swarm as a 7th level focus spell. This version of the spell summons swarms of venomous praying mantises, but the effects are otherwise the same as the spell.

Kayltanya attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Feint]{Feint} an enemy within 30 feet. If the Feint is successful, when Prayer Attack is used on subsequent turns, Kayltanya automatically makes the target flatfooted against her melee attacks for that turn without rolling a check to Feint, so as long as she remains visible to the target and the target remains within 30 feet of her. If Kayltanya uses Prayer Attack against a different target, she must attempt to Feint the target normally. When Kayltanya uses Prayer Attack, her next successful Strike with a sawtooth saber that turn deals [[/r {2d6}[persistent,bleed]]]{2d6} @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent bleed Damage} to the target.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:32]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 [[/r {5d6}[poison]]]{5d6 poison damage} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r {6d6}[poison]]]{6d6 poison damage} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 [[/r {8d6}[poison]]]{8d6 poison damage} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Kayltanya deals an extra [[/r {4d6}[precision]]]{4d6 precision damage} to @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Flat-Footed]{Flat-Footed} creatures.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]
